Meetings & Productivity AI Tools

34 Meetings & Productivity tools reviewed and rated. Click any tool for details, or use the AI Advisor to find the best fit for your goal.

AI Video Summarizer
Free · Medium reliability
Summarises long videos into key points and transcripts in seconds.
BeforeSunset AI
Freemium · Medium reliability
AI daily planner that turns your to-dos into a time-blocked schedule.
Diagrimo
Freemium · Medium reliability
Creates diagrams, flowcharts, and presentations from text with AI.
GitMind
Freemium · Medium reliability
AI mind-mapping and brainstorming tool for notes and diagrams.
GPT for Work
Freemium · Medium reliability
Brings ChatGPT and Claude into Google Sheets and Docs for bulk tasks.
Guideless
Freemium · Medium reliability
Creates step-by-step product guides and walkthrough videos automatically.
HyNote
Freemium · Medium reliability
AI note-taker that records, transcribes, and summarises meetings and lectures.
i10x
Freemium · Medium reliability
AI productivity assistant that automates document and data tasks.
Liminary
Free · Medium reliability
AI workspace that automates research and turns notes into insights.
NoteGPT
Freemium · Medium reliability
Summarises videos, PDFs, and lectures into notes and flashcards.
Supernormal
Freemium · Medium reliability
AI meeting notes that record, transcribe, and share summaries.
TeraBox AI
Freemium · Medium reliability
Cloud storage with AI tools for files, transcripts, and summaries.
tl;dv
Freemium · High reliability
AI meeting recorder that transcribes, summarises, and tracks insights.
Otter.ai
Freemium · High reliability
Real-time meeting transcription with AI summaries, action items, and speaker ID.
Fireflies.ai
Freemium · High reliability
AI meeting assistant that records, transcribes, and searches all your meetings.
Reclaim.ai
Freemium · High reliability
AI calendar optimizer that automatically protects time for tasks and focus.
Superhuman AI
Paid · High reliability
AI-powered email client with instant summaries, drafts, and triage automation.
Fathom
Free · High reliability
Highly-rated meeting assistant that auto-generates summaries, notes, and action items after every call.
Circleback
Freemium · High reliability
Automated meeting summaries and action items with high-quality transcripts and CRM sync capabilities.
Motion
Paid · High reliability
AI-assisted scheduling tool that automatically plans and replans daily tasks and projects to optimise focus.
Granola
Freemium · High reliability
Clean AI meeting assistant that captures key points without interfering in live calls or conversations.
Clockwise
Freemium · High reliability
Automates scheduling to create blocks of uninterrupted focus time for individuals and teams.
Shortwave
Freemium · High reliability
AI-powered email client designed to manage overloaded inboxes with smart shortcuts and instant summaries.
Saner AI
Freemium · Medium reliability
Personal knowledge management system for capturing and managing notes, tasks, and email via chat.
Actem
Freemium · Medium reliability
AI assistant that integrates with Jira to save hours on project management, ticket writing, and sprint planning.
Quill Meetings
Freemium · Medium reliability
Records work calls and automatically compiles next steps and follow-up actions into structured summaries.
Layla
Freemium · Medium reliability
AI travel agent that turns social media inspiration into detailed, actionable travel itineraries.
TravelDiari
Freemium · Medium reliability
Manages complex international trip logistics including visa assistance, bookings, and travel planning.

Free · High reliability

ClickUp AI
Freemium · High reliability
AI assistant inside ClickUp for writing docs, summarising tasks, generating updates, and standups.
Taskade
Freemium · High reliability
AI-powered workspace combining tasks, mind maps, and notes with team-collaborative AI agents.
Searchable

Typeless
